sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND EndDate > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) > 0

select.isEqual: SELECT REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;','a=1;') as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 <> CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , 'dept' TYPE , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , DISPLAYNAME , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN, DISPLAYNAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AA

SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM (
SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptCN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION ALL
SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptCN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION ALL
SELECT C.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER C WHERE C.tenant_ID = #tenantID# AND cn <> 'masteradmin' AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND C.department IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') from TBL_DEPTMASTER where tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1 OR extensionattribute1 = #deptCN#))
UNION ALL
SELECT D.cn FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER D JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND D.cn = E.cn WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND D.deptid IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1) OR extensionattribute1 = #deptCN#)) AA
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND extensionattribute1 = #deptCN# AND extensionattribute2 = dept_cd_path

SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , 'user' USERTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END COMPANY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_PCN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_PDEPT# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PROXYINFO SET PROXYUSERID = #v_PROXYUSERID#, PROXYUSERNAME = #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, PROXYUSERDEPTID = #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROXYINFO ( USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_PROXYUSERID#, #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , BIRTHTYPE , BIRTH , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND NVL(BIRTH, ' ') <> ' ' ORDER BY substr(birth, 8, 10)

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM(
SELECT cn, department as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLCom$
AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strGyumjikForOracle$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLAddjobCom$
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
) ORDER BY displayname asc, TO_NUMBER(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15) ASC
UNION ALL
SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
$strSize$
SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLCom$

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type FROM (SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ $strSQLCom$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER b INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLAddjobCom$ ) A) B WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSize$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , compnm2 , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , extensionattribute3 , extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE mail = #email# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT CONNECTTIME FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTTIME FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CONNECTIP FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTIP FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CN , TENANT_ID tenantId FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#) AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%a=1;%'
SELECT USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptId#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptId#
SELECT CN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #extension4#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%' || #v_PARENTID# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET LISTTYPE = #listType# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND (CN LIKE #searchValue# OR DISPLAYNAME LIKE #searchValue#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY CN
